name: send_app_control_with_appid
description: Launch a specific Tizen application using its app_id. Use this when you KNOW the exact app_id (e.g., org.tizen.browser, org.tizen.setting). Sets operation to default and sends a launch request directly to the specified application.

app_id.description: The Tizen application ID to launch (e.g., org.tizen.browser, org.tizen.setting, org.tizen.gallery)

extra_data.description: Optional key-value pairs to pass as extra data to the app
